item.title: AI 前沿信息爬虫，支持 API、RSS、SKILL 多种方式完全开源
item.description:
[分享创造] AI 前沿信息爬虫，支持 API、RSS、SKILL 多种方式完全开源，欢迎各位大佬尝试。自动爬取 GitHub Trending、V2EX、Hacker News、OpenAI、Anthropic、InfoQ AI 等 AI 信息

A new open-source AI frontier information crawler has been released, offering multiple access methods including API, RSS, and SKILL. It automatically collects AI-related information from platforms like GitHub Trending, V2EX, Hacker News, OpenAI, and Anthropic.

一款全新的开源AI前沿信息爬虫发布，支持API、RSS和SKILL等多种访问方式。该爬虫可自动抓取GitHub Trending、V2EX、Hacker News、OpenAI和Anthropic等平台上的AI相关信息。

Tags: ai · opensource · crawler · api · rss

item.title: Vibe Coding 提升效率，但为公司工作感觉“亏了”
item.description:

Developers are finding that 'vibe coding' significantly boosts their productivity by allowing them to manage multiple tasks and work streams efficiently. However, they feel this increased output is not adequately compensated when working for a company.

item.title: 我们认为的关系衰退比我们想象的对 Z 世代更大
item.description:
The relationship recession is even bigger for Gen Z than we thought

Research indicates that the 'relationship recession,' characterized by lower rates of steady relationships, is even more pronounced among Gen Z than previously understood. A key factor widening this gap was overlooked in earlier studies.

研究表明，“关系衰退”，即稳定恋爱关系比例下降的现象，在Z世代中比之前认为的更为显著。早期研究忽略了一个扩大这一差距的关键因素。

Tags: gen z · relationships · sociology · demographics

item.description:

item.title: 人工智能：写项目像熵增
item.description:

The article discusses a user's observation about AI's iterative thinking process, comparing it to entropy. The user posits that if an AI has a 90% accuracy rate, its continuous application in problem-solving, where it considers both correct and incorrect approaches, might lead to a diminishing accuracy over time.

文章探讨了用户关于AI迭代思考过程的观察，并将其比作熵增。用户认为，如果AI的正确率为90%，其在解决问题时不断考虑正确和错误的方法，可能会导致准确率随时间推移而下降。

Micron, Marvell drag the tech sector into a new bearish phase. Will the correction last this time?

Micron and Marvell's performance has dragged the tech sector into a new bearish phase, officially marking a correction after a week of heightened investor anxiety. This downturn raises questions about its duration and potential impact on the broader market.

Micron和Marvell的表现已将科技板块拖入新的熊市阶段，在经历了一周投资者焦虑加剧后，这标志着一次修正的开始。这一下跌引发了对其持续时间和对大盘潜在影响的疑问。

Tags: tech stocks · bear market · correction · micron · marvell

item.title: iFixit拆解特朗普手机，证实是HTC的仿制品
item.description:
iFixit Trump phone teardown confirms it’s an HTC dupe

iFixit has confirmed that the 'Trump phone' is an almost exact duplicate of the HTC U24 Pro after a teardown. This finding supports previous reports that the T1 Phone is a rebadged HTC device. The analysis highlights the manufacturing origins of the phone.

iFixit在拆解后确认“特朗普手机”几乎完全复制了HTC U24 Pro。这一发现支持了早期关于T1手机是HTC贴牌产品的报道。此次分析突显了该手机的制造来源。

Tags: ifixit · trump phone · htc · teardown · consumer electronics

item.title: 随着世界杯的开始，研究人员警告说，体育博彩者可能会用他们的杂货钱来赌博
item.description:
As the World Cup begins, researchers warn sports bettors may be gambling with their grocery money

A report released just before the World Cup begins indicates a correlation between sports betting and food insecurity. Researchers warn that individuals may be gambling away money intended for essential needs like groceries.

在世界杯开始前几天发布的一份报告显示，体育博彩与食物不安全之间存在相关性。研究人员警告说，个人可能会赌掉用于购买食品等基本需求的钱。

Tags: world cup · sports betting · gambling · poverty · research

美国参议员J.D.万斯表示，以色列总理内塔尼亚胡犯了一些错误。万斯指出，尽管内塔尼亚胡在积极追求以色列的利益，但这并不总是与美国的利益一致。

item.description:

Chemist Tim Cernak is transitioning his expertise from Big Pharma to become a 'Nature's drug designer.' Having developed precision therapies, he is now focusing on nature-inspired drug development due to environmental concerns.

The couple lives 20 miles apart, and he still commutes daily, raising questions about her husband's motivations and her own reasonableness.

一位女士正在寻求建议，因为她的丈夫拒绝出售他的房子，这阻碍了他们合并财务并舒适地共同生活。这对夫妇住在20英里外，丈夫仍然每天通勤，这引发了对其丈夫动机和她自身是否不讲理的疑问。

Tags: personal finance · relationship advice · housing · money management · marriage

item.title: 史蒂夫·罗森伯格：俄经济论坛被圣彼得堡无人机袭击蒙上阴影
item.description:
Steve Rosenberg: Russia's economic forum overshadowed by drone attacks on St Petersburg

BBC's Russia editor reports that Russia's flagship economic event, the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum, was overshadowed by Ukrainian drone attacks. The attacks reportedly targeted St. Petersburg, impacting the forum's proceedings or atmosphere.

BBC的俄罗斯编辑报道称，俄罗斯的旗舰经济活动——圣彼得堡国际经济论坛——被乌克兰的无人机袭击所笼罩。据报道，袭击目标是圣彼得堡，影响了论坛的进程或气氛。

Tags: russia · ukraine · drone attack · economic forum · geopolitics

item.title: JMGO N3 Ultimate投影仪是新的便携式4K冠军
item.description:
JMGO’s N3 Ultimate projector is the new portable 4K champ

The JMGO N3 Ultimate is declared the new favorite flagship portable projector, surpassing competitors like Anker. It is praised for its excellent 4K performance, ability to combat ambient light at various angles, and its potential to rival more expensive home theater setups, especially at night.

JMGO N3 Ultimate被评为新的旗舰便携式投影仪，超越了Anker等竞争对手。它因出色的4K性能、在各种角度下对抗环境光的能力以及媲美更昂贵家庭影院系统的潜力而受到赞誉，尤其是在夜间。

Tags: projector · 4k · portable tech · jmgo · home theater

item.title: 我现在设计时比使用Figma更常使用Claude
item.description:
I design with Claude more than Figma now

The author states they now use Claude more frequently than Figma for their design work. This suggests a shift in design tools and workflows, highlighting the increasing capabilities and integration of AI assistants like Claude in creative processes.

作者表示，现在他们在设计工作中比使用Figma更常使用Claude。这表明设计工具和工作流程发生了转变，突显了像Claude这样的AI助手在创意过程中日益增长的能力和集成度。

item.title: 秘鲁总统大选：不安全感和不稳定性影响选情
item.description:
Insecurity and instability drive voters in Peru's tight presidential race

In Peru's tight presidential race, insecurity and instability are major driving forces for voters. After experiencing eight presidents in ten years, the electorate is primarily seeking a leader who can restore stability and address pressing issues like crime and inequality.

在秘鲁的激烈总统竞选中，不安全感和不稳定性是驱动选民的关键因素。在十年内经历了八位总统后，选民主要寻求能够恢复稳定并解决犯罪和不平等问题等紧迫事务的领导人。

Tags: peru · election · politics · insecurity · social issues

item.title: “没人戴闪闪发光的珠宝”：如果人们不敢佩戴珠宝，这对美国意味着什么？
item.description:
‘No one wears bling’: What does it say about America if people are afraid to wear their jewelry?

The article explores the societal implications of people feeling unsafe to wear jewelry in public, even at formal events like shows, operas, and fundraisers. It questions what this fear says about the current state of safety and public perception in America.

文章探讨了人们在公共场合甚至在演出、歌剧和募捐等正式活动中不敢佩戴珠宝所带来的社会影响。它质疑这种恐惧反映了美国当前安全状况和公众认知。

Tags: usa · safety · jewelry · social trends · crime

item.title: 新一代减肥疗法旨在超越今天的GLP-1药物
item.description:
A new wave of weight-loss therapies aims to be better than today’s GLP-1s

A new wave of weight-loss therapies is emerging, aiming to be more effective than current GLP-1 drugs. Retatrutide is highlighted as one such promising drug, showing significant weight loss in clinical trials and also improving conditions like sleep apnea and knee pain.

新一代减肥疗法正在涌现，旨在比目前的GLP-1药物更有效。Retatrutide被强调为一种有希望的药物，在临床试验中显示出显著的减重效果，并能改善睡眠呼吸暂停和膝盖疼痛等病症。

Tags: weight loss · drug development · glp-1 · medical breakthrough · retatrutide
